page_metadata.biotools__summary: MUSA (Motif finding using an UnSupervised Approach) is a new algorithm that can be used either to autonomously find over-represented complex motifs or to estimate search parameters for modern motif finders.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MUSA (Motif finding using an UnSupervised Approach) is a new algorithm that can be used either to autonomously find over-represented complex motifs or to estimate search parameters for modern motif finders.
